verdict_detail: Refuse the proposed bundle. Constrain disaggregated components: Family A research-only at A1; Family B requires protocol specification; Family C refused pending mechanism evidence. Pilot deployment authority refused within initial five-year proposal. Private-firm role in research classification refused.
confidence: Medium-high on refusal of bundle-as-structured; high on refusal of pilot deployment authority; medium on Family A/B/C boundaries.
unresolved_uncertainty_sources: Whether bioelectrical-stimulation effects aggregate from organism-scale to field-scale.
Whether existing heterogeneous literature reflects real-but-weak signal or publication bias.
Whether independent advisory review can remain independent under political pressure.
Whether the coalition will accept Family A research-only authorization or treat refusal as total rejection.
